text:
Once upon a time, in a forest far, far away...

There lived a woodmouse who loved collecting tiny, shiny trinkets. Every morning, after chirpy morning songs, she would scurry through the thickets searching for trinkets to add to her collection.

This particular day, she found a small glistening orb that seemed impossible to resist. It glittered like starlight on the pond's surface.

Returning to her cozy burrow, she examined the prize close-up. Its shimmer was soothing, and she imagined flying through the night with it.

She tucked the orb securely away, eager to dream about the moonlit glimmer.

But then morning songs interrupted her dream.

Several hawk chicks sat before her windowsill. They yawned and pecked lazily.

One hawk chick croaked, "Well you could hang a crystal owl house next door. That's my favorite."

The other two hawks hooted eagerly.

The woodmouse blinked into reality.

She
